objective: Make Capture feel like credible local evidence by allowing saved entries to be corrected, repeated, and deleted without backend claims.
truth_boundary: Capture corrections are browser-local demo records only.
No WHOOP, account sync, hosted AI, Telegram, n8n, public MCP, Grok, Postgres, backend writes, or cross-device sync are connected by this slice.
The LifeMax lab boot/preflight remains red, so daily shared-context usability is not claimed.
implementation_summary: Added updated_at to CaptureEvent and normalized legacy captures with updated_at defaulting to created_at.
Normalized malformed capture kind/impact values back to safe local defaults.
Added inline Capture list editor with editable type, impact, label, note, plus Save edit, Repeat, and Delete controls.
Capture corrections now persist in localStorage and update downstream Patterns/Profile/export state.
Added unit migration coverage for legacy and malformed capture records.
Extended Playwright smoke to save a capture, edit it, save/delete a bad capture, refresh, and verify corrected evidence appears in Profile export.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Running build and screenshot:mobile concurrently caused a Next build lock.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Reran screenshot:mobile by itself after the build completed.
defects_found_and_repaired.rerun: npm run screenshot:mobile reached Playwright assertions.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Capture impact text became ambiguous after adding editable impact controls.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Scoped Playwright assertion to the saved .event-impact badge.

defects_found_and_repaired.defect: Capture form Label/Note became ambiguous with row-level Capture label/note inputs.
defects_found_and_repaired.repair: Changed browser proof to use exact form labels for new captures.

commands_run.command: redacted changed-file scan for secret-shaped strings

flow: open Capture and save a local event
edit saved capture label and note
save a second incorrect capture and delete it
refresh Capture and verify edited evidence remains while deleted evidence is gone
continue to Patterns, Experiments, Privacy, Today, Profile export
verify export includes edited capture evidence and not the deleted correction item

deployed_smoke.flow: On both aliases, saved a capture, edited label/note, saved and deleted a bad capture, refreshed and verified corrected evidence persisted while deleted evidence stayed gone, then opened Profile export and verified corrected capture appeared while deleted capture did not.

deployment.approval: PRODUCTION_DEPLOY_APPROVED=true promote was provided earlier in this goal thread.

live_smoke.flow: On both aliases, saved a capture, edited label/note, saved and deleted a bad capture, refreshed and verified corrected evidence persisted while deleted evidence stayed gone, then opened Profile export and verified corrected capture appeared while deleted capture did not.

proof_hygiene_note: This proof packet supersedes older checkpoint-audit deployment fields where later Vercel IDs changed after proof-only redeploys.
stop_continue_decision: checkpoint, not complete: capture correction product code is pushed/deployed/smoked on both public aliases; shared-context/Wave 1 readiness remains red and unproved.
